content:
About the Society

The Columbus Orchid Society is a nonprofit group of hobbyist and expert growers in central Ohio. We meet monthly, host the annual Columbus Orchid Show, and welcome growers of every level.
title: About the Society

content:
Annual Orchid Show

Each spring the society hosts the Columbus Orchid Show with vendor sales, AOS judging, and a public display of hundreds of plants. Details for the next show are posted here as they are confirmed.
title: Annual Orchid Show

content:
Membership

Join the Columbus Orchid Society to attend meetings, borrow from the lending library, enter the show, and connect with fellow growers. Annual dues are modest and renew each society year.
title: Membership
